name: www.iecsolutions.com
message: [AI generated] IEC Solutions is a telecommunication company specializing in designing, installing, and maintaining complex fiber-optic and copper communication networks. They offer a wide array of services including network design, project management, cable installation and upgrading, and communication room build-outs. Their clientele spans across both the public and private sectors. The company is committed to quality, safety and harnessing the latest technology.
